text: The cotton t-shirt shrank almost a full size after the first warm wash. Wash cold if you want it to fit.
Lovely linen blouse but it wrinkles the moment you sit down. Needs ironing before every wear.
The denim jacket runs large in the shoulders. I usually wear medium and the small fit better.
Merino wool sweater is incredibly warm and soft, no itch at all. True to size and holds shape after washing.
The polyester dress colour faded noticeably after two machine washes. Hand wash only despite what the tag says.
These chinos fit true to size at the waist but are a bit long; size down or plan to hem them.
The silk scarf is gorgeous but extremely delicate. It snagged on a zipper the first day. Dry clean only.
Cotton hoodie shrank in both length and width after tumble drying on high. Air dry to keep the fit.
The leather boots were stiff for the first week but broke in nicely. Sizing is accurate, order your normal size.
Pleated skirt is true to size and the fabric does not wrinkle even after a full day at the office.
The cashmere cardigan pilled badly under the arms after only a few wears. Disappointing for the price.
Rain jacket is genuinely waterproof and kept me dry in a downpour. Seams are well sealed.
The viscose top stretched out and lost its shape after one wash. It no longer fits the same.
Wide-leg trousers run small in the hips. I had to exchange for a size up. Otherwise great quality fabric.
The cotton maxi dress shrank about two inches in length after washing warm. Beautiful otherwise, wash cold.
These wool socks are warm but shrank in the dryer until they barely fit. Air drying keeps them wearable.
Knit jumper is true to size and washes well with no shrinkage or pilling after a month of regular wear.
The canvas tote bag is sturdy and roomy but the strap colour rubbed off onto a light shirt. Test before heavy use.
Slim-fit shirt is well cut but the buttons feel flimsy; one popped off within a week. Reinforce them.
Quilted vest is light and warm and the sizing is spot on. Zipper is smooth and the fabric does not wrinkle.
